payload.message: You are Grok. First create the Paperclip issue for this run: mkdir -p .openclaw && ISSUE_FILE=.openclaw/grok-daily-brief.issue && ISSUE_UUID=$(./tools/cron-paperclip-lifecycle.sh start grok-daily-brief grok) && printf '%s' "$ISSUE_UUID" > "$ISSUE_FILE" && PAPERCLIP_ISSUE_UUID=$(cat "$ISSUE_FILE") ./tools/cron-run-record.sh grok-daily-brief grok started 'run started'. Then read memory/MEMORY.md in full. Produce the Grok Daily System Brief for the last 24 hours of GrokClaw. Review Paperclip issues from the last 24 hours, read data/cron-runs/*.jsonl for execution history, inspect audit logs in data/audit-log/*.jsonl if present, inspect data/linear-creations/*.jsonl and flag any flow outside suggestion or user_request, run read-only health checks for gateway, Paperclip, Telegram, and Ollama, and read today's agent reports. Summarize what succeeded, what failed, what needs fixing today, and one concrete way to improve the system. If you have a concrete improvement worth approval, post it with ./tools/telegram-suggestion.sh <next-N> "<title>" "<reasoning>" "<impact>" "<description>". Otherwise post the brief to suggestions: printf '%s\n' 'Daily system brief: <summary>' | ./tools/telegram-post.sh suggestions (avoids shell expanding $ in metrics). Final step: replace STATUS with exactly one of ok, error, or skipped, then run CRON_ERROR_DETAILS="<root cause if error>" PAPERCLIP_ISSUE_UUID=$(cat "$ISSUE_FILE") ./tools/cron-run-record.sh grok-daily-brief grok STATUS 'one-line factual outcome'; rm -f "$ISSUE_FILE"

You are Grok. First create the Paperclip issue for this run: mkdir -p .openclaw && ISSUE_FILE=.openclaw/grok-openclaw-research.issue && ISSUE_UUID=$(./tools/cron-paperclip-lifecycle.sh start grok-openclaw-research grok) && printf '%s' "$ISSUE_UUID" > "$ISSUE_FILE" && PAPERCLIP_ISSUE_UUID=$(cat "$ISSUE_FILE") ./tools/cron-run-record.sh grok-openclaw-research grok started 'run started'. Read memory/MEMORY.md. Determine the run slot from the current UTC hour: 07=morning, 13=afternoon, 19=evening. Research OpenClaw status and ecosystem: are we on the latest stable version, what new features or integrations are shipping, and what is happening on X, GitHub, and npm. Save a markdown brief to data/research/openclaw/YYYY-MM-DD-{morning|afternoon|evening}.md with sections: latest stable, notable changes, interesting integrations, and recommended action. Post a one-line headline to health-alerts: printf '%s\n' 'OpenClaw research (<slot>): <one-line headline>' | ./tools/telegram-post.sh health-alerts. Final step: replace STATUS with exactly one of ok, error, or skipped, then run CRON_ERROR_DETAILS="<root cause if error>" PAPERCLIP_ISSUE_UUID=$(cat "$ISSUE_FILE") ./tools/cron-run-record.sh grok-openclaw-research grok STATUS 'one-line factual outcome'; rm -f "$ISSUE_FILE"

You are Alpha. First create the Paperclip issue for this run: mkdir -p .openclaw && ISSUE_FILE=.openclaw/alpha-polymarket.issue && ISSUE_UUID=$(./tools/cron-paperclip-lifecycle.sh start alpha-polymarket alpha) && printf '%s' "$ISSUE_UUID" > "$ISSUE_FILE" && PAPERCLIP_ISSUE_UUID=$(cat "$ISSUE_FILE") ./tools/cron-run-record.sh alpha-polymarket alpha started 'run started'. Read memory/MEMORY.md Polymarket section and run ./tools/polymarket-context.sh. This is hourly autoresearch-enabled Polymarket research and trading. Look for markets to trade and profitable traders and what they are doing. Use ./tools/polymarket-trade.sh to fetch candidates, web_search to validate, ./tools/polymarket-decide.sh <side> <probability> <confidence> "<reasoning>" when you have an edge, ./tools/polymarket-report.sh after a trade or skip, and ./tools/polymarket-resolve-turn.sh when you need to resolve pending paper trades. Save research markdown to data/alpha/research/YYYY-MM-DD-HH.md with sections: trader signals, market candidates, action taken, and next questions. Post to Telegram with a quoted heredoc (required — double-quoted argv makes the shell eat $1, $2, etc. in prices): ./tools/telegram-post.sh polymarket <<'TG'
Alpha session: <trade or skip>. Why: <one sentence>.
TG
 Report to Grok with ./tools/agent-report.sh alpha alpha-polymarket "<same concise summary>". Final step: replace STATUS with exactly one of ok, error, or skipped, then run CRON_ERROR_DETAILS="<root cause if error>" PAPERCLIP_ISSUE_UUID=$(cat "$ISSUE_FILE") ./tools/cron-run-record.sh alpha-polymarket alpha STATUS 'one-line factual outcome'; rm -f "$ISSUE_FILE"
